chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No. S – 146 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1323/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.1324/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on MA No.1325/2023 (S/A) 06.03.2023 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for the Applicant <><><><>..<><><><> 1. Urgency granted. 2. (i) At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application in respect of respondent No.6. It is dismissed as not pressed in his respect. (ii) & (iii). To be complied with within three days. 3. Deferred. 4 & 5.It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that learned trial Magistrate has accepted the report of the police for cancellation of subject FIR under “B” class without providing chance of hearing to the applicant, therefore, such order being illegal is liable to set aside by this Court. Point raised requires consideration. Let notice be issued against the private respondents and Additional PG for a date to be fixed by office after three weeks. Judge ARBROHI
